name: Field Marketing Impact
description: Know whether the events you funded generated real pipeline and revenue, or just vanity leads that never converted.
alsoSurfaces: Which events drove qualified pipeline this quarter?
What was the cost-per-pipeline-dollar by event tier?
Did pipeline from events convert at the same rate as inbound?
Which event types are repeat performers vs one-hit wonders?
beforeWeRun: Which event source — Splash, Bizzabo, manual list, all of them?
Define an "event-attributed" opp — first-touch only, or any-touch?
Time window — last quarter, year-to-date, or custom?

whatYoullGet.name: Event-sourced pipeline KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Events run, attendees, MQLs, SQLs, pipeline created, closed-won — with cost overlay.

whatYoullGet.name: Per-event ranking
whatYoullGet.desc: Table of events ranked by pipeline-per-dollar, with conversion rates.

whatYoullGet.name: Event tier comparison
whatYoullGet.desc: How Tier-1 trade shows compare to dinners, webinars, and meetups.

whatYoullGet.name: Vanity vs. converted
whatYoullGet.desc: Leads captured at events that never converted, with reasons surfaced.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your field-marketing dashboard in ~8 min.
